titleStmt.title: SII 22.556: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 556. (A.R. No. 556 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, AGASTYAKOṆḌA Agastyēśvara temple-On four tiers on the south, east and north walls Rājakēsari Chakravartin Kulōttuṅga Chōḷadēva 29th year (1098 A.D.)

summary.p: Like No. 553 above this also begins with the introduction Pugaḻsūḻnda-puṇari, etc. It registers an undertaking given by the residents of Puli-nāḍu in Perumbāṇappāḍi a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam to pay all the rents and taxes due on the dēvadāna village Kāvaṉkuṭṭai to the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva at Kōyāṟṟūr alias Uttamaśōḻapuram for the expenses of Tiruchchannaḍai (procession) and other items of worship to the deity. These taxes are said to have been paid as aḍaippam(?) in the shape of 3 kāśu and 30 kalam of paddy every year by Iruṅgōḷar who held the jīvitam of the nāḍu from the 25th to the 28th year of the king and the residents found themselves to pay the same taxes to the temple in future also irrespective of whether the nāḍu was granted as jīvitam or tirappu to any person (by the king). It is also stated that these residents received 40 kāśu from the temple as permanent investment for interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḷn=ta puṇariy Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemi Aḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vār Ayil muṉaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭip porpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūḻat teṉticait temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum po
nniyāṭai naṉṉilappāvai taṉimaiyun tavirttup puṉitanaṟ tiru maṇimakuṭa murimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat toṉṉila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila viḷākam veṅkaṇun taṉātu veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tanimeruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟaivirutantattañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai muṟai ni
ṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavan karuntalai paruntalait taṭattana ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappap piṉṉāṭ piṟkulap piṟaipola niṟpiḻaiyeṉṉuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṅkai villetir koṭā maṉṉavan kallatar naṅkili tuṭarntu maṇalūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum veṅkaṇum paṭappaṭar veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tanmāṉamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟiya malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭain toṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷuntalaivirit talamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum paṉṉāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payattetir māṟiya jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻuñ celvamum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niṟaiyuṅ kaṅkama
ṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇameṉṉum paraṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicai kaikkoṇṭaruḷa teṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruviḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum porukarittalaṅkaḷu ntantiravāriyum muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ peruñceṉaiyai Evip paiñcavar Aiyvarum poruta porkkaḷat tañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇeṉap pukka kāṭarattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vaṉacarar tiriyum pocca veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastambham vicaipeṟa niṟutti viramun tiyākamum niṟuttiya pārmicaic civaniṭattu maiyeṉat tiṉacintāmaṇip puvaṉa- muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari panmarāṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī
kulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9Āvatu Irupattonpatāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭip pulināṭṭu brāhmaṇarum veḷḷāḷarum Uḷḷiṭṭom Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭu koyaṟṟūrāṉa Uttama coḻapurattut tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟkut tiruccaṉṉaṭai Uḷḷiṭṭa pala nimantaṅkaḷukkum devatāṉamāka Inṉāṭṭut tirumalaikkut teṉkiḻakkaṭainta kāvankuṭṭai yeṉṟu peruṭaiya Ūr nāṟpāṟkellai Uṭumpoṭi Āmai tavaḻntu kalluṅkaḷḷiyum nāṭṭiṉa nilattāl vanta Iṟai maṉaikku māṭṭukkun taṟiyiṟait taṭṭārp pāṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyaṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu Irupattañcāvatu mutal Irupatteṭṭāvatu varai Iṉnāṭu jivitamuṭaiya Iruṅkoḷar Aṭaippam koṇṭa kācu 3
Ikkācu munṟu nellu muppatiṉ kalamum yāṇṭu Irupattonpatāvatu mutal nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Iruṅkoḷarkkut tavintu Iṉnāṭu maṟṟoruttaṟku jivitamākilu ntiṟappākilum Ivvaṭaippaṭi mel Iṟukkaveṇṭumeṉṉil nāṅkaḷe maṉkuṭi Ivvaṭaippaṭi niṟuttuvomākavum Itu Aḻippikkoḷvāruḷarākilum Itināl vanta Iṟai nāṅkaḷe Eṉṟu koṇṭu Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum It tevar śrī paṇṭārattut tiṅkaṭ kālakkup palicaikku nāṭṭup potumaiyirukoṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 4 10 Ikkācu nāṟppatum poliyūṭṭākak koṇṭu Ippaṭi santrādityavarai nāṭṭut tanmamākac celuttak kaṭavomāka Itukku Aḻivuceyvārum Aḻivu colluvārum geṅkai yiṭai kumari
yiṭai kurāṟpacuvaik konṟāṉ brahmavattip paṭuvārākac camaiyañ ceytu kuṭuttom pulināṭṭu nāṭṭom puli nāṭṭu nāṭṭār paṇiyiṉāl Eḻutiṉen nāṭṭuk kaṇakkarāṉa naṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai naṅkiliyāṉa Aṉanta vikkiramacoḻa catuṟpetimaṅkalattuc coḻanārāyaṇa brahmamārāyan Eḻuttu Ivai naṅkili Ulakaḷantacoḻa brahmamārāyan Eḻuttu puṅkanūr vaḷavanārāyaṇac catuṟperimaṅkalattu pūvaṟti Uruttrakkiramattaṉ Oppu puṅkanūr viḷākamuṭaic cantṛrātittak kiramittaṉ Eḻuttu Ācaṅkai cāmuṇṭakkiramittaṉ Oppu Akuḷi mātavakkiramittaṉ Oppu Ippaṭikku Aṟiven māḷava Iraviyaṇak kiramittaṉ Eḻuttu
koyāṟṟūrāṉa Uttama coḻapurattu yirukkum viyāpāri pampanāṉa Uttamacoḻan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṅkaikoṇṭa brahma(m)mārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai [śrīvira]rājentra pulināṭāḻvā ṭṭu Uppai nelli kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻa puli nāṭāḻvāṉ Oppu Ivai Uppai nelli veḷāṉ comatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai muṅkaivāṭi Irājentra coḻakkāmuṇṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mucuṇṭur rājarājentra catuṟperimaṅkalattu karikāla coḻa brahmamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu mucuṇṭur coḻamāttāṇṭa brahmamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku virarājentra brahmamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kirecimaṅkalattuppettaiya kāmuṇṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṉṟattūr virarājentracoḻa kāmuṇṭan Oppu Ivai muttakkūr Irukaiyakāmuṇṭan Eḻuttu Itu maṅkalattu brā(ā)hmaṇan vaṭukapāṭik kecuvakkiramavittaṉ Oppu Ippaṭikku vittan Oppu Ippaṭikku Ivai ceṟālattu Āṭkkoṇṭān Oppu Itu cāmuṇṭayanpaḷḷi jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa brahmamārāyaṉ Oppu Itu coḻa nārāyaṇa brahmamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciṟuviḷāṅkāṭṭur nākayakāmuṇṭan Oppu Ivai maṇikaṭṭi vacavaiya kāmuṇṭan Oppu Ivai pālantaiy Oppu Ivai peruviḷaṅkāṭṭur Aḻakiya coḻak kāmuṇṭan Oppu Ivai kuḷattūr kalivānaṉ citaiyakāmuṇṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṟkaṭṭur jayaṅkoṇṭa ve
ḷān Oppu Ippaṭikku Ivai murampil vāṇiyar kāmuṇṭan Oppu Ippaṭikku Ivai veḷiyanūr kaṅkaikoṇṭappallavarātittaṉ Oppu Ivai kaṟappaḷḷi koṇṭa coḻan Oppu .
Digital edition of SII 22.556 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
